basic_details.job_title: IOB General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Overseas Bank (A Govt. of India Undertaking)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Overseas Bank (IOB), a leading Public Sector Bank headquartered in Chennai, has invited online applications vide Advertisement No. HRDD/RECT/01/2026-27 dated 21.07.2026 for the post of General Manager – Chief Financial Officer (CFO), a single vacancy in the Unreserved (General) category. Eligible qualified Chartered Accountants with senior banking finance experience can apply online at www.iob.bank.in from 22.07.2026 to 05.08.2026.

important_dates.interview_date: Not specified; will be communicated to shortlisted candidates through the Personal Interview call letter via email

application_fee.details: Fees are non-refundable and cannot be adjusted against any other recruitment process. Payment can be made only through Online Mode using Debit Card, Credit Card, or Internet Banking (IOB Net Banking or Other Banks' Net Banking).

age_limit.age_details: 55 years (inclusive of applicable age relaxation), as on 01.07.2026

qualification.education_qualification: Qualified Chartered Accountant (FRM Certification and/or CFA preferred)

salary_details.details: Pay Scale (Scale VII-GM Level): Rs. 1,56,500 – 4340/4 – 1,73,860 Approximate CTC: Around Rs. 44 lakhs per annum The official will also be eligible for D.A., HRA/Lease rental, CCA, Medical and other allowances and perquisites as per rules applicable to Scale VII.

selection_process: Selection will be through Personal Interview/Discussion. The Bank may carry out a preliminary screening of applications to shortlist eligible candidates based on qualifications
and experience. Total marks allocated for the Personal Interview: 100. Minimum qualifying marks: 50 (45 for OBC/SC/ST/PwBD candidates). In case multiple candidates score the same cut-off marks
ranking will be done according to age

in descending order. The Bank may change the mode of selection depending on the number of applications received. Merely fulfilling the minimum qualification and experience criteria does not automatically entitle a candidate to an interview call; the Bank may consider additional qualifications
and level of responsibilities handled while shortlisting.
how_to_apply: Visit the Bank's official website www.iob.bank.in and go to the "Careers" page.
Click on "RECRUITMENT OF CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER" and select the post to be applied for.
Click on the "Register Online" link and complete first-time registration by clicking "Click here to Register Online".
Note the system-generated Registration Number and Password sent via email and SMS.
Upload photograph and signature as per the specifications in the Guidelines for Scanning and Upload of Photograph and Signature (Annexure I).
Fill in all required details carefully in the Online Application Form.

Upload the mandatory documents: Birth/SSC Certificate, Final Degree Certificate/Consolidated Mark Sheet, CA Certificate, and Work Experience Certificate (PDF, each under 200KB); upload NOC from employer, if applicable.
Click on "COMPLETE REGISTRATION" at the end of the form.
Proceed to pay the Application Fee/Intimation Charges through Online Mode (Debit Card/Credit Card/Net Banking).
Take a printout of the system-generated submitted online application form and the payment e-receipt for future reference.
important_instructions: Chartered Accountants exploring senior finance leadership roles can also check more Bank CFO and General Manager Recruitment notifications and PSU Bank Senior Management Jobs across India. Candidates based in Tamil Nadu can also browse the latest Chennai Government and PSU Jobs, while finance professionals with CA/CFA/FRM qualifications can explore more Chartered Accountant Government Jobs and Bank Recruitment 2026 notifications matching their profile.

content_sections.heading: IOB Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.details: Indian Overseas Bank (A Govt. of India Undertaking)
Qualified Chartered Accountant (FRM Certification and/or CFA preferred)
Minimum 15 years in overseeing financial operations, of which 10 years in Banks/FIs (5 years at Senior Management level)
55 years (inclusive of applicable age relaxation), as on 01.07.2026
Personal Interview/Discussion (preliminary screening may be conducted)

content_sections.heading: IOB Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Date for Determining Eligibility (Qualification, Age, Experience)

rows.date: Not specified; will be communicated to shortlisted candidates through the Personal Interview call letter via email

content_sections.heading: IOB Chief Financial Officer Vacancy Details 2026

rows.no_of_posts: 1 (SC-0, ST-0, OBC-0, EWS-0, UR/Gen-1; out of which PwBD: VI-0, HI-0, OC-0, ID-0)

content_sections.heading: IOB Chief Financial Officer Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: All eligibility criteria (Qualification, Age, Experience, etc.) for this post shall be computed as on 01.07.2026 (inclusive). A qualified Chartered Accountant Preferred: FRM Certification and/or CFA Minimum fifteen (15) years in overseeing financial operations, preferably accounting and taxation matters, in Banks/large corporates/PSUs/FIs/financial services organizations, of which ten (10) years should be in Banks/FIs, of which five (5) years should be at Senior Management level. Maximum age 55 years (inclusive of applicable age relaxation), as on 01.07.2026. A candidate must be either: a Citizen of India, or a subject of Nepal, or a subject of Bhutan, or a Tibetan refugee who came over to India before 1st January 1962 with the intention of permanently settling in India, or a person of Indian origin who has migrated from Pakistan, Burma, Sri Lanka, East African countries of Kenya, Uganda, the United Republic of Tanzania (formerly Tanganyika and Zanzibar), Zambia, Malawi, Zaire, Ethiopia and Vietnam with the intention of permanently settling in India. Candidates belonging to categories (ii), (iii), (iv) and (v) above must possess a certificate of eligibility issued by the Government of India before the date of this notification.

content_sections.heading: IOB Chief Financial Officer: Roles & Responsibilities
content_sections.text: Financial Reporting & Compliance: Overseeing the statutory auditing process, reporting audit results as per SEBI requirements, monitoring critical financial parameters (Non-Interest Income, ROA, ROE etc.), coordinating with NFRA and RBI on auditor-related issues, and handling Whole Bank Long Form Audit Report (WBLFAR) matters. Tax Compliance: Optimization of the Bank's tax liability, GST and TDS compliance. Accounting Systems: Developing and maintaining accounting systems per Accounting Standards and RBI Guidelines, Internal Financial Controls over Financial Reporting (IFCOFR), and implementation of IFRS/IND AS. Management Reporting: Coordinating with the Financial Control Department for review of regional and Whole Bank performance. International Banking Activities: Supporting the International Banking Group on accounting and tax compliance as per local regulators. Other Activities: Overseeing MIS reporting systems, strategic capital planning, balance sheet optimization, medium-term financial strategy, and managing stakeholder relationships with regulators, government, rating agencies, and investors.

content_sections.heading: IOB Chief Financial Officer Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Selection will be through Personal Interview/Discussion . The Bank may carry out a preliminary screening of applications to shortlist eligible candidates based on qualifications, suitability, and experience. Total marks allocated for the Personal Interview: 100 . Minimum qualifying marks: 50 (45 for OBC/SC/ST/PwBD candidates). In case multiple candidates score the same cut-off marks, ranking will be done according to age, in descending order. The Bank may change the mode of selection depending on the number of applications received. Merely fulfilling the minimum qualification and experience criteria does not automatically entitle a candidate to an interview call; the Bank may consider additional qualifications, greater experience, and level of responsibilities handled while shortlisting.

content_sections.heading: IOB Chief Financial Officer Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: Fees are non-refundable and cannot be adjusted against any other recruitment process. Payment can be made only through Online Mode using Debit Card, Credit Card, or Internet Banking (IOB Net Banking or Other Banks' Net Banking).

content_sections.heading: IOB Chief Financial Officer Remuneration & Pay Scale 2026
content_sections.text: Pay Scale (Scale VII-GM Level): Rs. 1,56,500 – 4340/4 – 1,73,860 Approximate CTC: Around Rs. 44 lakhs per annum The official will also be eligible for D.A., HRA/Lease rental, CCA, Medical and other allowances and perquisites as per rules applicable to Scale VII.

content_sections.heading: IOB Chief Financial Officer: Joining, Bond & Probation
content_sections.text: The selected candidate, at the time of joining, must execute a Bond of Rs. 3 lakhs to serve the Bank for a stipulated period of 3 years. The Bond will be invoked if the candidate resigns before the expiry of the bond period from the date of joining. On joining, the selected candidate will be on probation for a period of 1 year and subjected to continuous assessment. Confirmation depends on qualifying the assessment as per standards determined by the Bank. If the candidate fails to achieve the minimum stipulated standards, their services may be terminated. Place of Posting: Central Office, Chennai.

content_sections.heading: IOB Chief Financial Officer Required Documents 2026
content_sections.text: The following documents in ORIGINAL together with a self-attested photocopy must be submitted at the time of Personal Interview: Printout of the valid Personal Interview Call Letter Valid system-generated printout of the registered online application form Proof of Date of Birth (Birth Certificate or SSLC/Std. X Certificate with DOB) Qualification certificates: Chartered Accountant, and preferred qualification of FRM Certification and/or CFA, if held Other UG/PG certificates (for records) Photo identity proof such as Passport/Aadhaar/e-Aadhaar Card/PAN Card/Driving Licence/Voter's Card Mark sheets and relevant certificates for educational qualifications Work experience proof: Experience Certificates, Appointment Letters, Relieving Letters, Pay/Salary Slips Caste Certificate (for SC/ST/OBC/EWS candidates, in the prescribed format) OBC certificate with non-creamy layer clause (issued on or after 01.04.2026, for OBC candidates) Income and Asset Certificate (for EWS candidates) Disability Certificate in prescribed format issued by the District Medical Board (for PwBD candidates) No Objection Certificate (for candidates serving in Government/Quasi-Government offices/PSUs, including Nationalised Banks and Financial Institutions) Any other relevant document in support of eligibility Documents to be uploaded online (mandatory, PDF format, each under 200KB): Birth Certificate/SSC Certificate (proof of DOB), Final Degree Certificate/Consolidated Mark Sheet of Graduation/PG/Professional courses, CA Certificate, and Work Experience Certificate. A No Objection Certificate from the employer must also be uploaded, if applicable.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IOB Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Visit the Bank's official website www.iob.bank.in and go to the "Careers" page. Click on "RECRUITMENT OF CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER" and select the post to be applied for. Click on the "Register Online" link and complete first-time registration by clicking "Click here to Register Online". Note the system-generated Registration Number and Password sent via email and SMS. Upload photograph and signature as per the specifications in the Guidelines for Scanning and Upload of Photograph and Signature (Annexure I). Fill in all required details carefully in the Online Application Form. Upload the mandatory documents: Birth/SSC Certificate, Final Degree Certificate/Consolidated Mark Sheet, CA Certificate, and Work Experience Certificate (PDF, each under 200KB); upload NOC from employer, if applicable. Click on "COMPLETE REGISTRATION" at the end of the form. Proceed to pay the Application Fee/Intimation Charges through Online Mode (Debit Card/Credit Card/Net Banking). Take a printout of the system-generated submitted online application form and the payment e-receipt for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IOB Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Chartered Accountants exploring senior finance leadership roles can also check more Bank CFO and General Manager Recruitment notifications and PSU Bank Senior Management Jobs across India. Candidates based in Tamil Nadu can also browse the latest Chennai Government and PSU Jobs , while finance professionals with CA/CFA/FRM qualifications can explore more Chartered Accountant Government Jobs and Bank Recruitment 2026 notifications matching their profile.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in IOB Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the post of General Manager – Chief Financial Officer, under the Unreserved (General) category.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for IOB Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online registration closes on 05.08.2026. Application fee/intimation charges must also be paid by 05.08.2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for the IOB Chief Financial Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a qualified Chartered Accountant (FRM Certification and/or CFA preferred), with a minimum of 15 years of experience overseeing financial operations, of which 10 years should be in Banks/FIs (5 years at Senior Management level), and must be within the maximum age of 55 years as on 01.07.2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the pay scale for IOB Chief Financial Officer?
faq.answer: The pay scale is Rs. 1,56,500 – 4340/4 – 1,73,860 (Scale VII-GM Level), with an approximate CTC of around Rs. 44 lakhs per annum, plus D.A., HRA/Lease rental, CCA, Medical and other allowances.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for IOB Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: SC/ST/PwBD candidates must pay Rs. 175/- (intimation charges), while GEN/EWS/OBC candidates must pay Rs. 1000/-, both inclusive of GST.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IOB Chief Financial Officer?
faq.answer: Selection is through a Personal Interview/Discussion carrying 100 marks. Candidates must score a minimum of 50 marks (45 for OBC/SC/ST/PwBD) to qualify. The Bank may also conduct a preliminary screening of applications before shortlisting for interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there a service bond for this post?
faq.answer: Yes. The selected candidate must execute a Bond of Rs. 3 lakhs at the time of joining to serve the Bank for a stipulated period of 3 years.
